title: FIGURE 3 in Population structure of long-snout seahorse Hippocampus reidi in Southwestern Atlantic and implications for management
author: Queiroz-Brito, Maria Clara Gonçalves
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: FIGURE 3 | Haplotype networks based on the TCS method generated in PopART software of Hippocampus reidi for mitochondrial data (A), and nuclear data (B). The circles represent the haplotypes and different colors represent the sampling locations. Lines between haplotypes represent the mutation steps and black circles are missing or unidentified haplotypes. PA = Pará; PI = Piauí; CE = Ceará; RN = Rio Grande do Norte; PB = Paraíba; PE = Pernambuco; AL = Alagoas; BA = Bahia; ES = Espírito Santo; RJ = Rio de Janeiro; SP = São Paulo; SC = Santa Catarina.
